name: chokepoint-graph-api-recon
bodyMarkdown:
# Post-AiTM Graph API Reconnaissance Burst — Detection Chokepoint

**Priority:** HIGH | **Tactic:** Discovery | **Difficulty:** MEDIUM | **Prevalence:** MEDIUM
**Techniques:** T1087.004, T1069.003, T1526

## Overview
Within 10-20min of AiTM session theft, operator console executes 20-30+ Graph API calls across 5 recon categories within 30-60 seconds. Human portal navigation touches 1-2 categories per session; 4+ in 60 seconds = automated.

## Detection Logic
- **Hunt:** 4+ distinct Graph API endpoint categories from single UPN within 60s, empty c_DeviceId
- Correlate with preceding AiTM sign-in (Node.js UA) from same UPN
